infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CropCure requires camera permission to support real-time parental monitoring feeds.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CropCure requires microphone permission to support real-time audio safety checks.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: CropCure requires background location tracking to notify parents of child's safety zones.
